sizing_rule.note: Reduce discretionary position sizes by 25-33% (scale factor 0.67-0.75) when psychological capacity drops 20-40% from baseline. Exit discretionary positions within 10 trading days. Retain mechanical/systematic strategies. Resume trading after 7-14 day cooldown.

source_rule_text: A trader should exit all positions when experiencing major personal life disruption, because psychological impairment prevents optimal trading decision-making.
